stemHtml: A student pilot is performing slow flight exercises at a constant altitude. They reduce speed whilst pulling the stick back to maintain altitude. As the aircraft has excellent stall characteristics, the aircraft eventually stalls and starts to descend at a constant speed, with the pilot still pulling the stick fully backwards. Select the correct statement about drag before and after the stall.

options.a: Induced drag increases until the stall, then decreases to zero, and total drag continues to decrease to zero.
options.b: Induced drag increases until the stall, then decreases slightly, while total drag continues to increase beyond the stall.
options.c: Parasite drag decreases until the stall, and then reaches zero during the stall.
options.d: Parasite drag increases to its maximum during the stall, then decrease sharply thereafter.
